home.error_loading_streams: There was an error when loading streams. Please try again later.
home.description: Stream, watch, and manage live video feeds from connected devices.

onboarding.completionDesc: You're all set and ready to operate at full capacity.
onboarding.progressSaved: Your onboarding progress has been saved.

welcome.title: Welcome to MediaMTX
welcome.description: MediaMTX lets you stream and watch live video feeds from connected devices. This short walkthrough will show you where to find everything.

walkthrough.title: Finding your way around
walkthrough.description:
(1) Tap any stream tile on the home page to start watching.
(2) Use the Start Broadcasting button to launch a new feed from OpenTAK ICU, UAS Tool, GoPro, or any advanced source.

onboarding.title: Onboard to MediaMTX

import.install: Download OpenTAK_ICU from GitHub on Android.
import.manual: Or import manually by copying these settings to OpenTAK_ICU settings:

streams.noStreamsHint: Start broadcasting to see streams here.

video.streamNotFoundHint: This stream may have ended or the URL is incorrect.
video.streamOfflineHint: This stream is not currently broadcasting.
video.playbackErrorHint: Could not connect to the stream. It may have ended.

broadcast.title: Start Broadcasting
broadcast.opentak_icu_desc: Stream from ATAK via OpenTAK ICU
broadcast.opentak_icu_step2: Use the import button to import settings
broadcast.gopro_step3: Use the link to start streaming
broadcast.gopro_appstore_alt: Download GoPro Quik on the App Store
broadcast.gopro_googleplay_alt: Get GoPro Quik on Google Play
broadcast.uastool_desc: Stream from ATAK via UAS Tool
broadcast.uastool_step1: Install ATAK and UAS Tool plugin
broadcast.uastool_step2: Use the import button to import settings
broadcast.uastool_googleplay_alt: Get UAS Tool on Google Play
broadcast.guideHint: If you need more instructions use the Guide Button

auto_import.title: Auto importing settings
auto_import.description: OpenTAK ICU will be provided to Android devices after connecting to a TAK server. Use the Import Settings button above to auto-import. After importing you can start streaming.

manual_settings.title: Opening settings manually
manual_settings.description: If auto-import is not available, open OpenTAK ICU and tap the gear icon to open settings.

streaming_settings.title: Streaming settings
streaming_settings.description: Navigate to 'Streaming Settings' to configure the streaming parameters.

copy_values.title: Configure stream values
copy_values.description: Enter the Protocol (RTMPS), Address, Port (1936), Path, Username and Password. These values are shown above in the quick steps.
